## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format --set-exit-if-changed .` passes
- [ ] `dart analyze` passes with no issues
- [ ] `dart test` passes
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests (or not applicable)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Version bumped in `pubspec.yaml` (if this is a releasable change)
